chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 5965 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.10598/2025 2. For hearing of CMA No.27654/2024 3. For hearing of CMA No.26523/2024 4. For hearing of main case. 23.05.2025 Mr. Shahbakht Pirzada, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Pervaiz Ahmad Memon, advocate for the respondents No.1 to 3. Mr. Sardar Zafar Hussain, Advocate for respondent Nos.4 and 5. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Mr.Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General. 1. Urgency granted. Learned counsel for the respondents waive notice. It is jointly submitted by the respective learned counsel that controversy herein is squarely covered by a recent Division Bench judgment of this court dated 17.04.2025 in SCRA 41 of 2025 and connected matters. Counsel adverts to paragraph 12 thereof to demonstrate that the entitlement claimed by the petitioner has now been judicially recognized. In view hereof it is jointly submitted that this petition may be disposed of for the same reasoning and upon same terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge nasir
